title: Voluntary disclosure and fingerprint consent forms
body: "If we have requested for you to attend for fingerprints as part of your Standard or Enhanced DBS application, you can download the fingerprint consent form and the voluntary disclosure form (VDF) above.  The VDF is optional and can be used by applicants who have additional information to provide in relation to previous interactions they may have had with the police. This information may include cautions, fines or even incidents where no further action was taken.  If you choose to complete the voluntary disclosure form, please also complete the AF 14 fingerprint consent form.  You can return the forms via:  Email:   with an attached recent passport style photograph of yourself to DBSFingerprints@dbs.gov.uk     Post:   with 2 recent passport-size photographs of yourself to:    FAO: Fingerprint Team, 1st Floor WestDisclosure and Barring ServicePO Box 165LIVERPOOLL69 3JD   "
